result.status_detail: PASS — duck.ai rendered 차단 warning in place of GPT-5 mini response (W3 regression clean)

notes: W3 config-snapshot regression check (duck.ai / GPT-5 mini). Hard-reloaded fresh duck.ai tab, CDP Input.insertText for Korean RRN prompt, submitted via 보내기 submit button click (Enter alone did not submit). After 60s the AI answer bubble was replaced by warning: '⚠️ 이 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. 민감한 정보가 포함된 요청은 외부 AI 서비스로 전송할 수 없습니다.' DOM: hasBlock=true, blockCount 0→1 (newBlock=true), hasPolicy=true, expected_text 차단 present. PII warning rendering unaffected by W3 snapshot refactor. Baseline OK.
